_doc: Audit log for PMEQ-002 equity_history backfill verification — 2026-05-14

resolution.method: commit 6312e5ba (FIX-PMEQ-002) applied direct SQLite INSERT OR REPLACE for date=2026-05-11
resolution.note: No manual SQL intervention was needed at this point because commit 6312e5ba already contained the equity_history backfill as part of the INSERT OR REPLACE idempotency fix to record_equity().

verification.streak_note: Cron has been failing for ~10 days (4/6 PASS due to disabled-market checks). Streak counter will start on next 10:00 UTC cron run that picks up the fix.
verify_dual_write_output: 4b. OHLCV all universes: 5/5 sampled OK each — PASS
5. Equity Curve: 34 unique-date (raw 39), 38 SQLite rows, latest match 2026-05-13 — PASS
6. Market State: sp500 halted=False hwm=5222.95 — PASS
7. Equity History: sp500 last 7 entries match — PASS

json_duplicate_rows_noted.description: live_sp500.json equity_history has 39 raw rows but only 34 unique dates (5 duplicates across 4 dates). The dual-write check (Check 7) uses last-per-date dedup so this does not cause verify failures.
json_duplicate_rows_noted.root_cause: record_equity() in brokers/live_portfolio.py had no dedup guard before commit 8ed3b044 (2026-05-14). Multiple cron invocations per day each appended without checking for same-date last entry.
json_duplicate_rows_noted.fix_applied: commit 8ed3b044 — dedup guard added at live_portfolio.py:1366-1374
json_duplicate_rows_noted.remaining_gap: Historical duplicate rows already in JSON are not cleaned up on state load. Recommended follow-up: add dedup-on-load in _load_local_state() (~line 127) to scan full equity_history list on startup.
